documents.contentText:
REQUEST FOR QUOTATION – Surgical Masks

Toronto Hospital Group (THG) is seeking quotations for the supply of Level 3 Surgical Masks.

Technical Requirements:
- Must comply with ASTM F2100-21 Standard
- ASTM F2100-23 Standard NOT accepted
- Bacterial Filtration Efficiency (BFE): ≥ 98%
- Particulate Filtration Efficiency (PFE): ≥ 98%
- Fluid Resistance: 160 mmHg
- Latex-free
- Individually packaged (50 pcs/box)

Estimated Annual Volume: 500,000 boxes (estimate only, not guaranteed)

Pricing:
- FOB Toronto warehouse
- All duties, taxes, and transportation costs included
- 30-day payment terms

Delivery:
- Initial delivery within 30 days of PO
- Ongoing: weekly deliveries
- Must maintain 2-week safety stock at Toronto warehouse

Qualification:
- Valid Health Canada Medical Device Establishment License (MDEL)
- ISO 13485 certification
- Test reports from accredited lab within last 12 months

Submission Deadline: December 12, 2025
